ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_TROUBLE_MAKER.title: Trouble Maker
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_TROUBLE_MAKER.descr: Show 2 random other event cards. Choose 1 to play immediately. Gain {StarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_TROUBLE_MAKER.selec: Choose an event card to play
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_FOOD_SAFETY.title: Food Safety
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_FIGHT_FUN.title: Fight, Fun!
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_FIGHT_FUN.descripti: Give each ally a [card]Giant Rock[/card] card ([exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust]+[ethereal]Ethereal[/ethereal]).
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_GIFT_FROM_SKY.title: Gift from Sky
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_GIFT_FROM_SKY.descr: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) for all allies and gain {StarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_HAND_ERASE.title: Hand Erase
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_HAND_ERASE.descript: Discard the rightmost card from all allies' hands.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_SPRINT.title: Sprint
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_EQUALITY.title: Equality
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_EQUALITY.descriptio: Set all allies' HP to 1 and gain {Block:diff()} [blue]Block[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_DEUS_EX_MACHINA.des: Choose 1 event card other than [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card] and play it twice.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_DEUS_EX_MACHINA.sel: Choose an event card to play twice
ASTRALPARTYMOD-EVENT_PLAYER_REPRESENTATI: Only you make a judgment. On 1-3, you take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage and teammates take {TeamDamage:diff()} damage; on 4-6, you gain {SelfStarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold] and teammates gain {TeamStarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_FAMOUS_BLADE.title: Famous Blade
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_FAMOUS_BLADE.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. After playing this, consume up to 2 [power]Sword Aura[/power]. Then gain 1 [power]Sword Aura[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_HEALING_SLIME.title: Healing Slime
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_SAVE_ME_MOUSY.title: Mousy Save Me
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_SAVE_ME_MOUSY.descr: Target player draws 1 card and gains [power]Mouse Shield[/power] and [power]Counter[/power]. If that target is at 50% HP or less, you also gain [power]Mouse Shield[/power] and draw 1 card.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_TRANSFER.title: Transfer
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_TRANSFER.descriptio: Spend 5 Gold. Target player gains 5 [gold]StarLight[/gold]. Your [relic]Persona Derivative: Wealth[/relic] counter +1.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_FATE_GUIDANCE.title: Fate Guidance
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_FATE_GUIDANCE.descr: Advance your persona relic counters by 1 and gain 1 Energy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_ROYAL_PREROGATIVE.d: Draw 3 cards. The drawn cards gain [gold]Temporary[/gold] and are discarded at end of turn.
Discard all cards in your hand. Draw cards equal to your original hand size + 1.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_SHADOW_FUSION.title: Shadow Fusion
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_SHADOW_FUSION.descr: Count all enemy [power]Twin Shadows[/power]. Gain 1 temporary [green]Strength[/green] this turn for each separate shadow, then remove all enemy [power]Twin Shadows[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.d: Discard all cards in your hand. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times. For every 2 discarded cards, deal damage 1 additional time. For every 3 total Energy cost among the discarded cards, increase this damage by 1. Discarded 0-cost cards count as 1 Energy. Discarded X-cost cards count as your current Energy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-BASE_ABILITY_ORBITAL_RAIL:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the target. [gold]Unblockable[/gold].
When used as [gold]Orbital Bombardment Material[/gold], this card counts as [blue]2[/blue] cards and its cost counts as [blue]3[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_CHAIN_REACTION.desc: Each other player draws 1 card. If that player's hand has fewer than 4 cards, they draw 2 instead. Then add 1 [card]Bite[/card] to your hand.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_BITE.title: Bite
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_BITE.description: Gain 1 stack of [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. Then gain temporary [red]Strength[/red] equal to your current [power]Dragon Awakening[/power], up to 4.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_DRAGONS_ROAR.title: Dragon's Roar
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_DRAGONS_ROAR.descri: Apply 1 [vulnerable]Vulnerable[/vulnerable] and 1 [weak]Weak[/weak]. Gain 3 temporary [red]Strength[/red], and until the enemy turn starts, ignore damage from enemy sources.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_MIXED_COCKTAILS.des:
In single-player, this affects you. In multiplayer, choose an ally.
Discard up to 3 cards from your hand. Apply effects to the target based on [gold]Mixed[/gold], then draw cards equal to the number discarded.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_MIXED_COCKTAILS.sel: Choose up to 3 cards to discard
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_IRON_VIRGIN.title: Iron Virgin
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SKILL_IRON_VIRGIN.descrip: Gain [power]Iron Virgin Ward[/power] and ignore damage until your next turn starts. If your persona's [power]Boundary Reinforcement[/power] has not triggered this turn, also gain 3 temporary [red]Strength[/red].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-COLLECTORS_CARD_I_AM_DRAG:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and temporarily reduce their [red]Strength[/red] by {StrengthLoss:diff()}.
After being played, when you take damage, automatically play this card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]. Then return it to your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
If you have lost HP this turn, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} extra damage.
